# Tilt Derivative

**Summary**: A filter applied to gravity data to enhance the edges of structural features.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024]] applied tilt-derivative (TDR) filters to identify fault lines and rock contacts.

## Key Results and Findings

- The zero-value contours of TDR were used to interpret lineaments as potential fracture zones. ([[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024, p. 71]])
